title: Aurora World 32795 Aurora Fancy-Pal Peek-A-Boo Pet Carrier, Pink and White, 8in, Unicorn Gift
features: Part of Aurora’s highly popular Fancy Pals Pet Carrier Collection
Soft and extremely cuddly pet carrier bag & soft toy made with high quality materials
Unicorn soft toy can be removed from the bag, so there are two gifts in one
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World 32795 Aurora Fancy-Pal Peek-A-Boo Pet Carrier The Fancy Pal Peek-A-Boo unicorn is the perfect gift for anyone who loves unicorns. The unicorn is not attached to the bag so it can be removed. So you have two gifts in one, a handbag and a unicorn soft toy. The bag has a beautiful pink design with a peeping unicorn. Have fun with your fancy pal friend wherever you go. Part of AURORA's highly popular Fancy Pal Collection, beautifully handcrafted in fine plush material. Handwash and airdry, suitable from birth. About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.

specifications_table.Radio Control Suitability: ‎Gift for kids ages 3 and up, play, care as a pet
